mainEntity.name: How to recover AI visibility after Google algorithm update in Dallas?
mainEntity.text: How to recover AI visibility after Google algorithm update in Dallas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Re-optimize schema, add fresh Dallas citations, test in 5 AIs. Recovery in 4-8 weeks with citability focus.

suggestedAnswer.text: Post-update: Audit drop sources, diversify beyond Google. Dallas firms: Emphasize TX dockets. Monitor via SEMrush AI tools; prevent with ongoing GEO.
